name: Aditi Sharma (actress, born 1996)
profileSummary: Aditi Sharma is an Indian actress and model who mainly works in Hindi television. She made her acting debut in 2018 and is best known for her portrayal of Meera Dhingra Kapoor in Kaleerein, Roshni Choudhary Khan in Yehh Jadu Hai Jinn Ka!, Dua Siddiqui Akhtar in Rabb Se Hai Dua and Apollena in Apollena - Sapno Ki Unchi Udann. In 2024, she participated in the reality show Fear Factor: Khatron Ke Khiladi 14.
